zh.Great Torrington, Devon, England: 英國戴文格亞特 托林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elinor Merton於大約1351年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Sir Richard I de Merton73歲，母親Margaret de Clevedon63歲。她於1366年與Sir Matthew Stawell在英國薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1380年在英國享年30歲。

zh-hans.Great Torrington, Devon, England: 英国戴文格亞特 托林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elinor Merton于大约1351年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Sir Richard I de Merton73岁，母亲Margaret de Clevedon63岁。她于1366年与Sir Matthew Stawell在英国薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1380年在英国享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Merton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Merton, such as found in Surrey, Kent, Devon, Oxfordshire, and Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with both Marton and Murton .

variants.name: Marton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Antal, Arpad, Geza, Andras, Bela, Denes, Endre, Gaza, Imre, Istvan, Janos.

English: habitational name from any of several places so called, principally in Lincolnshire, Warwickshire, and North Yorkshire, named in Old English as ‘settlement by a lake’ (from mere or mær ‘pool, lake’ + tūn ‘settlement’) or as ‘settlement by a boundary’ (from (ge)mære ‘boundary’ + tūn ‘settlement’). Compare Martin 2.
Hungarian (Márton): from the personal name Márton (see Martin 1). This surname is also found in Romania; see also 3 below.

nameMeanings.name: Elinor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Elinor Merton was born about 1351, in Devon, England, her father, Sir Richard I de Merton, was 73 and her mother, Margaret de Clevedon, was 63. She married Sir Matthew Stawell in 1366, in Cothelstone, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1380, in England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elinor Merton est née environ 1351, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard I de Merton, avait 73 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Clevedon, avait 63 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Matthew Stawell en 1366, à Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elinor Merton um 1351 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard I de Merton 73 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Clevedon 63. Sie hat 1366 in Cothelstone, Somerset, England Sir Matthew Stawell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 30 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elinor Merton è nata il circa 1351 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Richard I de Merton, aveva 73 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Clevedon, aveva 63 anni. Lei sposato Sir Matthew Stawell nel 1366, nel Cothelstone, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1380, nel England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elinor Mertonが約1351年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard I de Mertonは73歳，母Margaret de Clevedonは63歳であった。1366年にイギリスソメルセトコスエルストーンでSir Matthew Stawellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1380年にイギリスで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elinor Merton(이)가 대략 1351년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard I de Merton(은)는 73세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Clevedon(은)는 63세였다. 그녀는 1366년 영국 서머세트 컷헬스톤에서 Sir Matthew Stawell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 영국에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Manor of Merton near, Great Torringto: Merton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elinor Merton nasceu aproximadamente 1351, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard I de Merton, tinha 73 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Clevedon, tinha 63 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Matthew Stawell em 1366, em Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elinor Merton родилась около 1351 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard I de Merton было 73 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Clevedon, 63. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Matthew Stawell в 1366 г. в местности котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elinor Merton nació aproximadamente 1351, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard I de Merton, tenía 73 años y su mamá, Margaret de Clevedon, tenía 63 años. Se casó con Sir Matthew Stawell en 1366, en Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1380, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
